Interface WindowSurface

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, NonThrowingAutoCloseable, RenderingSurface
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractGLFWWindowSurface, GL_GLFWWindowSurface
public non-sealed interface WindowSurface extends RenderingSurface
A window rendering surface.

Custom implementations of ths interface are not supported by GraphicsManager; use its createWindowContext(...) methods to create & obtain an instance of this interface. If you want to insert a stage into a UI framework's window (JavaFX, Swing, etc.) - implement EmbeddedSurface instead.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    RenderingSurface.Feature, RenderingSurface.ResizeListener

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    FB_ORIGINAL_SIZE

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Set<RenderingSurface.Feature>
    getFeatures()
    Returns supported features of this surface.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.NAMEABLE is supported.
    int
    getX()
    Returns X coordinate of the top-left corner of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.MOVABLE is supported.
    int
    getY()
    Returns Y coordinate of the top-left corner of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.MOVABLE is supported.
    void
    hide()
    Hides this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.HIDEABLE is supported.
    boolean
    isFullscreen()
    Checks whether this surface is in fullscreen mode, if RenderingSurface.Feature.FULLSCREENABLE is supported.
    boolean
    isHidden()
    Checks whether this surface is hidden, if RenderingSurface.Feature.HIDEABLE is supported.
    boolean
    isResizable()
    Checks whether this surface is resizable, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported.
    boolean
    isTranslucent()
    Checks whether this surface is translucent (only the rendered content is visible).
    void
    onResize(RenderingSurface.ResizeListener callback)
    Adds a resize listener to this surface.
    void
    setFullscreen(boolean fullscreen)
    Changes the fullscreen state of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.FULLSCREENABLE is supported.
    void
    setName(String name)
    Sets the name for this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.NAMEABLE is supported.
    void
    setPos(int newX, int newY)
    Sets the position of the top-left corner of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.MOVABLE is supported.
    void
    setResizable(boolean resizable)
    Changes the resizable state of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported.
    void
    setSize(int newWidth, int newHeight)
    Sets the new size for this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported.
    void
    show()
    Shows this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.HIDEABLE is supported.

    Methods inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    acquireBuffer, close, createPixelReader, getHeight, getPos, getSize, getWidth, isExplicitShouldClose, pollEvents, present, setShouldClose, shouldClose

  • Method Details

    • getFeatures

      default Set<RenderingSurface.Feature> getFeatures()
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Returns supported features of this surface. This can be used to check whether some method will throw UnsupportedOperationException.
      Specified by:
      getFeatures in interface RenderingSurface
      Returns:
      supported features of this surface

    • isTranslucent

      boolean isTranslucent()
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Checks whether this surface is translucent (only the rendered content is visible). This is, in general, determined at creation time and may not change later.
      Specified by:
      isTranslucent in interface RenderingSurface
      Returns:
      whether this surface is translucent

    • setSize

      void setSize(int newWidth, int newHeight)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Sets the new size for this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported.
      Specified by:
      setSize in interface RenderingSurface
      Parameters:
      newWidth - the new width
      newHeight - the new height
      See Also:
      • RenderingSurface.getFeatures()

    • isResizable

      boolean isResizable()
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Checks whether this surface is resizable, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported. Surfaces that don't support this feature must always return false here.
      Specified by:
      isResizable in interface RenderingSurface
      Returns:
      whether this surface is resizable

    • setResizable

      void setResizable(boolean resizable)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Changes the resizable state of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported. Surfaces that don't support this feature usually ignore calls to this method.
      Specified by:
      setResizable in interface RenderingSurface
      Parameters:
      resizable - whether this surface must be resizable

    • onResize

      void onResize(RenderingSurface.ResizeListener callback)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Adds a resize listener to this surface.

      It may be useful to check the resizable state before adding a callback. Surfaces that are never resizable are free to ignore calls to this method.

      Specified by:
      onResize in interface RenderingSurface
      Parameters:
      callback - the listener to call every time this surface gets resized

    • getX

      int getX()
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Returns X coordinate of the top-left corner of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.MOVABLE is supported.
      Specified by:
      getX in interface RenderingSurface
      Returns:
      X coordinate of the top-left corner, if supported
      See Also:
      • RenderingSurface.getFeatures()

      int getY()

      Returns Y coordinate of the top-left corner of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.MOVABLE is supported.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      Y coordinate of the top-left corner, if supported
      See Also:
      • RenderingSurface.getFeatures()

      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Sets the position of the top-left corner of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.MOVABLE is supported.
      Specified by:
      setPos in interface RenderingSurface
      Parameters:
      newX - the X coordinate of the position
      newY - the Y coordinate of the position

      Returns:
      whether this surface is hidden, is supported

      void setFullscreen(boolean fullscreen)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Changes the fullscreen state of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.FULLSCREENABLE is supported.
